reasoning: The control requires separating user functionality from system management functionality, which directly maps to Kubernetes RBAC practices. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved by ensuring that users do not have cluster-admin privileges unless necessary, separating roles for regular users and administrators, and enforcing least privilege principles. These checks ensure that administrative tasks are not performed by regular users, aligning with the control's intent.
title: 3_13_3: 3.13.3 Separate user functionality from system management functionality
